# setEnabled(_:)

**Instance Method**

Enables or disables the controls in the authorization plug-in’s view.

## Declaration

```swift
func setEnabled(_ inEnabled: Bool)
```

## Parameters

- **inEnabled**: The state the controls should be in.

## Discussion

When the authorization plug-in calls this method, the subclass should call [doc://com.apple.securityinterface/documentation/SecurityInterface/SFAuthorizationPluginView/setEnabled(_:)] on the controls that are in its view.
